'''''Star Wars: Rebel Forces''''' is a game created for [[Tiger Electronics]]' [[Wikipedia:R-Zone|R-Zone]] handheld gaming system, released in [[1997]].

{{Game-stub}}

==Publisher's summary==
''*''Clash with the forces of the Empire.''''
''*''Take part in a Rebel attack simulation.''''
''*''Battle stormtroopers, bounty hunters, and assassin droids.''''
